articles.title: Universal Tower Defense X Tier List [UPD 2.25]
articles.description: Updated on April 21, 2026 : Added Ant King. The best units in Universal Tower Defense X depend on five categories which are Hybrid, Hill, Ground, Support and Farm. I'll show you the best ones for all roles as well as talk about the best game modes , traits and relics for all units. Here's my Universal Tower Defense X tier list and guide . Table of contents Universal Tower Defense X Unit Tier List Synchro Units - Best DPS S-Tier Air/Hybrid A-Tier Air/Hybrid B-Tier Air/Hybrid C-Tier Air/Hybrid S-Tier Ground A-Tier Ground B-Tier Ground S-Tier Support A-Tier Support B-Tier Support Farm Universal Tower Defense X FAQ Universal Tower Defense X Unit Tier List Image by Destructoid This is just a preview of the Universal Tower Defense X tier list but the real ranking reasons are below. I'll go into each individual unit and talk about why it's ranked where it is, as well as the best game modes for it and specific traits. Note that I won't go much into ranking for progression since any unit can be good to progress with if you upgrade and Etherealize it with some Relics equipped. I'll focus more on Nightmare, Infinite, Challenges, Virtual Realm, etc. As for the tier breakdowns, consider the S-Tier as the META tier with the A-Tier being great alternatives and the B-Tier being weaker options . How to Synchro Units : You need both units at max upgrade either owned by you or another player via request - The Synchro unit takes the stats, traits and relics from only one unit of the Synchro Drive. Farm : Bulme (Legendary) & Fastcart (Epic) Best Traits : I'll list the best traits for each unit below. Farming Tips : Check out the FAQ below for the best farming tips for Gems, Trait Rerolls and more. Synchro Units - Best DPS Synchro Units Rankings Explained Unparalleled Armor Synchro Drive Nutaru (Beast) + Ancient Shinobi (Reawakened) The best Synchro unit overall Synchro units have the best DPS in the game but cost 2 units It's usually worth it with similar value as removing placements for more DPS with Ruler Notes: The best due to applying a 3s Stun/Confused on every attack + breaking armor Majestic Armor Synchro Drive Nutaru (Beast) + Sasku (Great War) The second best Synchro unit Notes: I prefer Unparalleled Armor for CC but Majestic deals pretty good damage with a ton of crit damage and DoTs on-hit Underworld God Synchro Synchro Drive Underworld God (Death) + Water God (Primordial) The third best Synchro unit Notes: Really good self-DPS boosting buffs and armor damage plus debuff cleanse S-Tier Air/Hybrid S-Tier Air/Hybrid Rankings Explained Ant King (Savage) Secret - Ant King World Raid The EVO material also drops in the Raid • A really strong though incomplete Radiation-based Hybrid DPS that stacks damage buffs on kills • Synergizes with Jinoo for more damage and range buffs • If built right Ant King can output top 5 DPS in the game • That said The Shadow ability is locked for now so he's not at full potential • My advice is to get him either way since if he's dealing massive Radiation DPS now, it can only be even better with The Shadow Best Trait : Ruler/Astral can't stack Radiation Ancient Mage (Sage) Act 3 of Beyond Fantasy Legend Stage Evo item from the same stage Best trait: Ruler, Astral Best Relic Set: Super Roku Best Stats: CritDMG/DoT Top & CritRate/DMG Bottom Best Accessory: Bloodline Eye Notes: Incredibly flexibile high DPS unit able to switch stat modes for burst damage, debuffs, DoTs and more Crow Shinobi (Reanimated) Act 3 of Shinobi World War Legend Stage Evo item from the same stage Best Trait: Eternal, Astral Best Relic Set: Rebellious Shinobi, Reanimated Armor set Best stats: DoT Top & DMG Bottom Best Accessory: Bloodline Eye, Spirit Armor Notes: A ton of debuffs for enemies, great DoT DPS and massive AOE damage with meteor Migumen (Finale) NY Capsule Exclusive • She's now Meta with the new update • Great DPS overall but her Nuke on max deals massive damage, especially on E6 • Apart from the Nuke she's a great Burn DoT damage unit • This is because in addition to the Burn DoT she's also excellent against armor due to True Damage and Radiation • Extremelly flexibile unit when you play around her active • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred Phantom Captain (Carrier) Secret • Massive DPS summoner unit that summons both attack planes on her location and line planes that explode on contact • The line planes deal excellent supporting AOE burst damage while her personal planes deal sustained DPS AOE damage • She also buffs her planes for +30% crit rate and +50% crit damage during the first 10 seconds of their duration for a ton of DPS • Overall a strong contender for one of the best Hybrid DPS units • Best Trait : Ruler Jangluu (Eclipse) Winter Capsule Exclusive • Deals a ton of damage on Frozen enemies even though she doesn't stun on Freeze • Best combined with units that can freeze like Ice Empress since she also buffs Ice units • Requires a specific team setup but can potentially be one of the best units in the game due to the Icy Flux nuke on Frozen enemies • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Berserker (Enraged) Mythic • Much better now in the new update with the fix • Top DPS unit in the game overall and arguably one of the best Hybrids due to game mode flexibility, CC and hyper armor damage • Fast ramp-up value • Obliterates armored enemies, slows and increase all damage taken on enemies • Second-best unit for VR after Kriatu EVO • Decent on Infinite but not the best • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred A-Tier Air/Hybrid A-Tier Air/Hybrid Rankings Explained Lord of Flies (Tempered) Banner Mythic • An overall Meta unit since he deals high burst damage with his Resonance Stacks and can grant stun immunity • Then he can massively buff himself for each unit he gives stun immunity to • You can also choose to nuke enemies in a Full AOE and quickly stack up Resonance every 300 seconds • A must-have unit for stun immunity IMO Jinoo (Monarch) Banner Secret • Top 3 DPS unit with shadows dealing massive damage with the scaling buff • Best unit for Infinite due to the massive scaling and decent on VR • Note that he's not the best for faster game modes since he takes a while to scale up • That said, he got a massive buff on December 20 giving his passive to the unevolved version and pumping his mana gain and damage • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Bio-Android (Perfect) Secret • Very slow to get going but gets powerful if you have time to evolve him (Gets Hybrid) so he's better in Infinite • Evolves by beating mini-bosses he spawns and E2 is really good since it reduces the HP of those bosses • You need to reach Perfect state for him to be good (Hybrid+Max Upgrade) though Semi-Perfect does have Confusion which is decent support • Most of the prime DPS comes from high base damage, Sub-Unit summons and the 5% on-hit Line AOE follow up • That said, the active nuke does stun in an AOE which is really strong for bosses and is on a 90s global cooldown • Overall, really slow to get going but is Meta DPS and utility on final evolution Koyote (Number One) Mythic • A Hybrid-on-upgrade DPS machine that spams wolf summons on takedown dealing sustained DPS and charging energy (Especially on E4) • Also has a massive damage burst Nuke that fires on max energy doing 500% damage • Koyote isn't the best hybrid DPS but he's good for any mode • Best Trait : Ruler for main DPS or Sacred/Eternal for secondary DPS Ichiko (Rage) Secret • Ichiko is good, don't get me wrong, but he's just raw DPS with not a lot of utility past the 5-second active stun that's on a 90s cooldown • Requires a specific build around crit chance and damage to maximize his passive damage and overall DPS (Go full damage on substats) • Still one of the better units in the game, just slightly weaker than the ones above • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred Dragon Guy (Silverite) Challenges Secret • Got massive buffs to Twin Dragon Hunting Flash, Shatter and Are You Scared helping him in faster modes • He's not a Meta DPS but he is Meta if you consider him a Hybrid DPS Support mix since he can CC enemies • Great on Virtual Realm and Infinite but takes a while to activate his Trance (This is not as much of a problem anymore due to buffs) • He's best with units that can apply Freeze since his Shatter deals burst damage on frozen targets • He can also self-cleanse stuns which is really good for Infinite • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Scarlet Maid (World) Get from Virtual Shop • Similar to Dragon Guy where she's a hybrid DPS and Support that can now be viable with the December 20 buffs to her skill damage and The World ability • Stuns enemies, has Slows and deals great DPS with Time Gauge stacks which trigger various high damage attacks • The only downside is that her CC needs to be activated by attacking and is not on every attack like other CC units • Great on Infinite • That said, she's best when you have E6 since the CC lasts for a long time • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred B-Tier Air/Hybrid B-Tier Air/Hybrid Rankings Explained Rohan & Robot 16 (Limit Breaker) Mythic • A ton of passives here but to summarize it's a weak unit at start slowly increasing damage up to Wave 10 • That said you have Red Combo and A-16 which boost your damage with follow up attacks, low SPA, stuns and stun immunity • Then it's all about the two actives where the first is available once you stack up Rage and is an AOE Nuke (It take away A-16 damage boosts) • It also puts you into Mode 2 with maxed-out stats and a Line AOE active that deals massive damage and resets your Rage • Overall, despite high DPS in the end, it's a lot of work and really slow to get going similar to Bio-Android which might not be good in most modes • This is a powerful alternative Hybrid Ice Empress (Forst) Winter Capsule Exclusive • An amazing Meta Support, see why below in the Support section. • B-Tier only in terms of Hybrid DPS Mob (100%) Mythic • Overall a great slowing unit and an always useful Hybrid that got a slight damage buff which adds up fast • Really good for VR and Infinite as a supporting slowing option with Eternal and decent with Ruler as a DPS but I would stick to it as a support/DPS mix • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Spade (Donut) Mythic • The best Air/Hill DPS unit and one of the best units in the game overall due to the passive on-shield damage • Amazing for progressing story/legend stage since you can get it fast and you need a good Air ASAP • Otherwise great for VR and Infinite as your Hill slot with Ruler as a main DPS or Astral as a secondary DPS • Best trait is Astral since Spade is the best Burn DOT unit in the game right now • Best Trait : Astral or Ruler C-Tier Air/Hybrid C-Tier Air/Hybrid Rankings Explained Sharpshooter (Precision) Mythic • Massive range with decent DPS and a decent amount of off-supporting capabilities (Place her in the back so she's in Sniper mode) • Can hit enemies across the entire map in Sniper mode with a neat little damage bonus • The grenades offer some AOE support damage • She can also mark enemies with her active to take more damage from all sources and buffs Fire unit damage placed near her • Overall the best Hill alternative if you don't have Jangluu or Lord of Flies • Best Trait : Pick the highest damage trait or Ruler since she doesn't need extra range from Traits because Sniper mode has infinite range Ultiorra (Oblivion) Mythic • Similar to Tierabel in that Ultiorra deals decent DPS and also has supporting abilities from Unpredictable Despair where he can Confuse or Stun enemies • You also get an active Nuke that deals massive damage on a 45s cooldown which is pretty good for clearing important waves • That said overall not the best DPS for Hill • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Cyborg (Fearless) Mythic • The weakest Air/Hill unit but can still hold his own due to the December 20 buffs • The main reason he's much better now is that his Nuke got a massive buff for targeted damage and is on a much lower CD • Decent DoT and he's a must-have if you don't have Spade or other Hill units to hit fliers • Best Trait : Wizard or Ruler Super Roku (Enraged) Mythic • Roku has access to amazing tech where you can teleport him to different choke points within range to prolong his DPS or beat placement boss mechanics like Zeus • That said he's slow like Rohan & Robot 16 starting out with a massive damage debuff that goes away after a few waves but it's not worth it IMO • Once the debuff is gone he can deal pretty decent DPS with his passive buffs but it might be too late at this point since he's just a Hill unit • Would be better if he was Hybrid so as things stand he's a low-tier Hill unit Tierabel (Hydro) Mythic • Mid-damage with some support potential • Becomes stronger in her mode • Note that it isn't that worth it running Nell just for the combo on the first passive since it's not that much • Overall is kind of like Mob where it's decent DPS and decent Support but not the best at either • Best Trait : Eternal S-Tier Ground S-Tier Ground Rankings Explained King Sailor (Unrivaled) All Banners Best Trait: Ruler Best Relic Set: Super Roku Best Stats: DMG Top & CD Bottom Best Accessory: Shadow Reaper Necklace Notes: Massive AOE damage, self buffs and stun immunity How to Evo: Craft his Sword Get all Required Fragments 1st Shard from Event Shop in Shinobi Alliance 2nd Shard from Alliance Leader (Ultra Boss Shop) 3rd Shard from Legend Stage Act 3 of new Naruto Map 4th Shard from New Raid Gamemode in the Raid Shop Ancient Shinobi (Reawakened) Shinobi Alliance Event Game Mode Unit Evo items from Ultra Boss Shop Best Trait: Ruler Best Relic Set: Rebellious Shinobi Best Stats: DMG Both Best Accessory: Bloodline Eye Notes: Tons of debuffs, DoTs, and self buffs Nutaru (Beast) Kitsunox Struggle Ultra Boss T3-T4 Evo item from Raid Shop Best Trait: Ruler, Eternal Best Relic Set: Rebellious Shinobi Best Stats: DMG Both Best Accessory: Bloodline Eye Sasku (Great War) Shinobi Battlefield Raid Act 5/Boss Rush/Evolved from Sasku (Chakara) Evo item from Raid Shop Best Trait: Ruler or Eternal Best Relic Set: Rebellious Shinobi Best Stats: DMG/Crit DMG Top & CD/Crit Rate Bottom Best Accessory: Biju Energy, Bloodline Eye Notes: Flexibile as both a DPS and support with a ton of debuffs and DoTs Has great stun defence Water God (Primordial) Step-up banner Secret • Both a Meta DPS unit by himself and SSS-Tier combo with Underworld God for the Syncro unit • Deals great DoT damage with Affliction Time and self-boosting CRIT • Also scales incredibly well to deal twin attacks eventually • As a cherry on top has access for a full path damage burst with Wave on a 60s cooldown • Best Trait : Eternal A-Tier Ground A-Tier Ground Rankings Explained Fallen Prince (Ruthless) Mythic • Also a ramp-up unit like Roku and Rohan but unlike them he's not slow since he gets no damage debuff • He just keeps buffing himself up each wave and kill with damage, crit chance, range and attack speed until he goes Super Saiyan • Once you reach max cap with his crit chance buff (0.25% per kill up to 30%) he goes SS with Hyper Armor Damage and guaranteed crits after a few kills • Overall a very strong Ground unit that's good for any mode and isn't that slow like some Cell Update units Dragon Slayer (Hero) All Banners Evo items from Act 1 of Beyond Fantasy Legend Stage Best Trait: Ruler, Eternal Best Relic Set: Super Roku Best Stats: DMG Both Best Accessory: Reaper Necklace Notes: An excellent alt-Meta DPS with great boss damage that increases if boss is stunned or has DoTs Underworld God (Death) Banner Mythic • The Evo Base/Non-Syncro version of Hades is an alt-Meta Ground Circle AOE DPSs • With just 2 placements it's incredibly worth to go Ruler for massive damage • He just stacks DoTs which deal impressive damage • Best Trait : Ruler First Human (Father) Featured Challenge Secret • One of the more flexibile Ground units in the game with his follow-up attack elemental mechanic • Basically you can customize Adam's attacks by choosing which elemental unit to place near him and have him do follow up attacks • Each element has a different effect from high DPS to debuff support to even Hybrid mode (Light) • Best Trait : Ruler Kriatu (Cheater) Mythic • The best unit for VR • Deals increasingly more damage as he crits • Get the Duelist trait on him ASAP so that he can crit more and therefore ramp up damage faster • He can only gain more crit from Traits • Got a huge buff on ability damage making him even better • Best Trait : Duelist B-Tier Ground B-Tier Ground Rankings Explained Robot 17 & 18 (Fighterz) Mythic • A high-tier Ground unit that's better than Roku and Rohan because even though they scale damage with waves they don't start with a damage debuff • They deal great Circle AOE DPS with massive range and you can switch between them for 3 seconds of Disruption or Confusion per switch which is great utility • As a cherry on top they're also immune to stuns and have an active Nuke on final upgrade for decent damage • Overall a great Ground unit with good DPS and some support potential The Drink (Survivor) Mythic • A simple and decent Full AOE contender for your Ground slot that deals impressive DPS thanks to various self buffs • Also does Burn damage on Upgrade 6 • Overall not a lot of utility here, just pure DPS so it's not a must-have but it's nice to have Sasku (Chakra) Mythic • Overall great on any mode with excellent DoT damage, utility and overall DPS (Especially with the buffs on Arrow and Kirin) • The utility mainly comes from the passive which has some hybrid potential • Also has decent CC for pseudo-supporting • Excellent for grinding Story since he's easy to get and EVO • You can either run him as your main DPS with Ruler or off-DPS with Wizard for DoTs • Best Trait : Wizard or Ruler Grommjow (Panther) Exclusive • Deals decent AOE DPS and works similarly to Koyote where you're collecting meter but instead of a nuke, Grommjow transforms on full meter • The transformation boosts both single-target DPS and AOE damage due to the explosion per enemy • Great against armor • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Ronin Obito/Rogue Oni Exclusive Day 7 Daily Reward • The best on Story mode since you can get him for free Day 7 and grind story • Impressive DoT damage but not as much utility as other DoT units like Sasuke, Ace and Admiral • Will be much stronger if they gave him an EVO like Rule • Best Trait : Wizard Footballer (Ego) Exclusive BattlePass Reward Level 25 • Decent DPS with the self-buff and mini damage buff on ally but doesn't combo with anything nor excel in anything • Great for Story since you can get it fast for free via BattlePass • Overall a decent DPS option if you don't have anything else • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred S-Tier Support S-Tier Support Rankings Explained Prodigy Mage (Apprentice) All Banners Evo items from Act 2 of Beyond Fantasy Legend Stage Best Trait: Fission, Astral, Sacred Best Relic Set: Super Roku Best Stats: DMG Top & CD Bottom Best Accessory: Reaper Necklace Notes: One of the best combinations of DPS, Slows and Stuns for stalling enemies Also buffs herself your units with attack speed for Hill and crit rate for Ground One of the best supports in the game Miku (Super Star) Mythic • Buffs all units around her with either increased Damage or Range • Etherealize up to 6 is key here to increase the buffs • The best buffer in the entire game and she becomes worth it after you place some units already so don't use her as a starter or second unit • Amazing for Infinite • Best Trait : Artificer First Emperor (Greatest) Ragnarok Infinite Gamemode Secret Must get to Wave 20 for runs to count toward Pity Pity is 100 EVO Items can be farmed through the Trials Tab In Quests • First Emperor is an overall Meta unit but I decided to put him in the Support category for lots of reasons • He slows, confuses enemies, reflects stuns, gives all your units follow up attacks, etc. • He's a powerhouse support unit that also deals a ton of damage itself • Might be one of the best units in Universal Tower Defense overall • That said you must rush max upgrade so that you can switch Demon Arts for maximum flexibility Enlightened God (Holy) Banner Mythic • An AOE buffing DPS support hybrid that progressively buffs your units more and more • Similar to First Emperor in that you're extremely flexibile with your weapon switching choices (Switch at Max Emotion stacks) • You can deal massive enemy HP-scaling damage with the Axe or high DoT damage with synegies with Cycle of Wrath • Alternatively, you can switch to the Shield and reflect debuffs into buffs for your other units • Incredibly strong DPS/Support unit • Best Trait : Eternal Ice Empress (Forst) Winter Capsule Exclusive • A mix of impressive DPS and execution as well as top-tier stalling support and even a bit of buffs • She has a ton of passives but the main ones are freezes and slows for amazing stalling for your other DPS units • Summons units which is really strong but requires 50 kills on her meter so she's best for extended game modes and not quick farming • Combos well with other Frost units which she buffs for 20% like Koyote or Jangluu • Overall a powerhouse DPS and Support hybrid • Best Trait : Ruler Admiral (Magma) Legendary EVO • The best budget unit in the game since you get it easily as a Legendary and it stays strong in the late-game via EVO • Easily one of the best Fire units in the game • Admiral is good for two reasons, he deals impressive DOT damage but also acts as a support with Confusion • Confusion makes enemies walk back which is amazing stalling for your main DPS units • Best Trait : Wizard or Fission Karbonoto (Sage) All Banners Evo items from Ultra Boss Shop Best Trait: Eternal, Sacred Best Relic Set: Rebellious Shinobi Best Stats: DMG Top & CD Bottom Best Accessory: Reaper Necklace, Strawhat Notes: Amazing support since he can revive units and then do follow up attacks with Hyper Armor damage A-Tier Support A-Tier Support Rankings Explained Tai Yang Reward from New Event • A manually aimable unit where you stack burns for great DPS and then at 20 burn ticks confuse and stun them • It's fun to play and you also get a free placement when you place Fire units (Once per game) • Not the most OP unit but I highly recommend trying him with another strong Fire unit Shunks (Conqueror) Mythic • You get both damage and stuns all in one unit making Shunks one of the best units in the game • Definitely worth to EVO • Meta support DPS for all game modes due to stuns • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred Love Goddess Valentines Capsules in Events Tab • Love Goddess is all about upgrade discounts and massively buffing a single unit with Crit • Great in VR with Kirito or you can run her with some single-unit-focused comps with S-Tier units • That said I prefer Miku for AOE buffs or Enlightened God/First Emperor for much higher flexibility Rule (ROOM) Exclusive BattlePass Reward Level 50 • Incredibly versatile support that stuns and teleports enemy units • Great on all modes but especially on Virtual Realm • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Bambee (Blitz) NY Capsule Exclusive • Deals okay damage but her main strength is flexibility since she applies status effects based on your team's most used element • These status effects are also better with Bambee since they last longer • I recommend building your team around Ice since due to Ice Empress, Koyote and Jangluu being some of the best units in the game Water : Slow Wind : Wind Shear Rose : Bleed Dark : Stun Fire : Burn Light : Radiation Ice : Freeze Judas (Darkness) Battle Pass Level 50 Exclusive • Low SPA but deals decent DPS, slows and has a ton of utility with his active • He's a sub DPS unit with supporting options that are quite good and while he's not a must-have support he's still pretty good • His active is a crazy good support tool with a ton of flexibility on what statuses you can apply from slows to confusion Ja'frey (Lightning Assassin) Battle Pass Level 25 Exclusive • Ja'frey is a great alternative for your CC support slot because he's an on-attack Stun-based unit with decent DPS • The stuns go up to 1.5 seconds on E4 which is really strong for any mode • Plus he's not that hard to get B-Tier Support B-Tier Support Rankings Explained Lulu Quest Secret Check out how to unlock him> • Our Lulu/Lelouch Quest Guide will show you how to unlock this unit • Lulu is a great support unit when he works that doesn't attack but instead issues orders based on his cooldown • He can stall units a lot which helps your main DPS units get in more damage • He can also stun enemy units • That said, there's also some great damage here with the Beam order (Which got buffed) • Great for all game modes and is overall one of the best supports • Laughing Captain Relic set bonus is great on him for reduced active cooldowns • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred Tierabel (Hydro) Mythic • Same as her Hill entry but with a focus on her slowing and supporting capabilities which are decent but not the best • Best Trait : Eternal Scarlet Maid (World) Get from Virtual Shop • A hybrid DPS and Support that can now be viable with the December 20 buffs to her skill damage and The World ability • Stuns enemies, has Slows and deals great DPS with Time Gauge stacks which trigger various high damage attacks • The only downside is that her CC needs to be activated by attacking and is not on every attack like other CC units • Great on Infinite • That said, for Support purposes she's lower on the list since she's best when you have E6 for a massive duration boost which can be slow to grind • Best Trait : Ruler or Sacred Mob (100%) Mythic • Overall a great slowing unit and an always useful Hybrid that got a slight damage buff which adds up fast • Really good for VR and Infinite as a supporting slowing option with Eternal and decent with Ruler as a DPS but I would stick to it as a support/DPS mix • Best Trait : Ruler or Eternal Nelle (Primal) Mythic • A weird DPS unit that revets between baby and adult form granting various buffs that ultimately produce sub-optimal damage • That said has some decent supporting abilities with Ichiko and Tierabel which are both really good units • That said, I wouldn't run Nellee unless you really like her from Bleach Shakumira EVO Legendary EVO • A low DPS unit but offers great support potential with a stalling ability • Not the best unit to EVO for all modes but pretty great on Infinite, especially with the cooldown buff on the CC • Best Trait : Artificer Zora Legendary • Great beginner unit and overall a decent support with the CC effect • Scarlet Maid is a better unit and DPS but Zora's CC is more reliable for supporting • Best Trait : Artificer Farm Farm Rankings Explained Bulmo Legendary • A better version of Fastcart • Best Trait : Fortune Fastcart Epic • Get the Fortunate trait on him ASAP • Good for all modes • Best Trait : Fortune Universal Tower Defense X FAQ How to Synchro Drive Units in Universal Tower Defense X? First you need to eligible units that can be Synchro Drived (Check out the info for Synchro units above). Then you need both units at max upgrade and you can fuse them. You can also Synchro Drive with eligible units owned by another player but you have to request that and they have to approve. The Synchro unit takes the stats, traits and relics from only one unit of the Synchro Drive. How to beat Zeus in Universal Tower Defense X? To beat Zeus you have to destroy the pillars when he flies up. Follow the warnings and as the red highlighted pillars spawn on the map when he leaves to regenerate, place units to destroy the pillars. This cancels his regeneration and makes him come back down. Alternatively you can nuke him down with high damage before he starts regenerating. How to open Portals in the Cell update in Universal Tower Defense X? You can open Portals with the Perfect Arena Key dropped in the Dragon Ball Legend stages. You must complete each Portal tier in order to be able to get the Perfect Arena Key for the next portal tier (T2>T3 25% drop chance/T3>T4 10% to keep T4 50%). How do the Elements interact in terms of bonus damage in Universal Tower Defense X? • Fire is strong against Rose and Ice • Water is strong against Fire and Wind • Ice is strong against Water and Rose • Wind is strong against Ice and Fire • Rose is strong against Wind and Water • Light is strong against Dark • Dark is strong against Light What are the best ways to farm Gems in Universal Tower Defense X? • From Achievements • Ragna Challenge - 200 gems per clear • Half-hourly gem challenges - 500 to 1000 gems per clear • Easy Mode Infinite - Caps at 900 gems on Wave 50 (Difficulty 100%) or 1300 gems on Wave 50 (Difficulty 1000%) • Virtual Mode on Easy and 100% Difficulty - 1000 Gems • Virtual Shop - 1 Virtual Token for 25 Gems What are the best ways to farm Trait Rerolls in UTDX? • From Achievements and Level Milestones • Ragna Challenge • Half-hourly trait reroll challenges • Daily challenge • Buy 5 daily at the Gold merchant • Buy at Virtual Merchant What are the best ways to farm gold in UTDX? • Summoning units and selling them • Ragna challenge • Hollowed Moon Act 6 Nightmare (100% Difficulty) - Gives 1140 gold per clear What is the best way to farm EXP and Levels in UTDX? The best way to level up is to farm Virtual Realm, Ragna Challenges and finish Story mode. That's it for my Universal Tower Defense X tier list and guide. Check out our Universal Tower Defense X codes for a bunch of free goodies. The post Universal Tower Defense X Tier List [UPD 2.25] appeared first on Destructoid .

articles.title: ‘Muslim kids are really underrepresented’: the animated movie where medieval maths meets eager young minds
articles.description: Time Hoppers: The Silk Road is a time-travel adventure whose child heroes must save the legacy of Islamic scholars who shaped modern science. Its makers reveal their inspiration, and reflect on their success ‘Some people said it doesn’t exist – that it’s a fantasy.” So says Flordeliza Dayrit of the silk road, the vast network of trade routes that once connected Asia, Africa and Europe – and the starting location for Time Hoppers: The Silk Road, the animated feature she co-created with her husband, Michael Milo. Speaking from their home in Edmonton, Canada, the couple describe a project that started with personal intrigue and grew into something far more ambitious. With its theatrical release in UK cinemas, Time Hoppers turns this sense of curiosity into a fast-moving children’s adventure: a story in which four young protagonists travel back in time to the medieval Islamic world, meeting the scientists and scholars whose discoveries shape our current everyday lives. Continue reading...

articles.title: Suppose Iran didn’t exist
articles.description: ‘ASSUMING and not conceding’. That phrase underpinned the masterly court craft of Perry Mason, the popular detective-lawyer of Erle Stanley Gardner’s riveting creations. Let’s assume Benjamin Netanyahu’s dream of destroying Iran as an Amalek of the Torah or Donald Trump’s threat to bomb the country into extinction somehow got pre-empted and Iran never existed. Let’s assume and not get needlessly reasonable to question the absurd assumption. Would it not be a distraction, given the loaded assumption, to ask if Firdausi would still have written the Shahnameh had Iran not existed? Equally counterfactually, where would Zoroastrianism be born? Through which country would Alexander reach the Beas river to culminate his adventures of conquest? Who would Changez Khan turn upon in lieu of Iran? Who would dispute the Shatt al-Arab waterway with Saddam Hussein, assuming Iraq managed to dodge Zionism’s poisoned dart? Without Iran where would the Safavids install the Shia beliefs as state religion? In which case who would Ayatollah Khomeini be plotting to overthrow and, without Iran, where? An Indian journalist wrote a play not long ago with a similarly absurd theme and titled it The Muslim Vanishes . The thought was amusing and terrifying at once. Look up the pre-Islamic history of the subcontinent through Hindutva’s jaundiced eye (as is Netanyahu’s for Iran) and one would perhaps glean how in the absence of Mughal rule, currently being airbrushed from school curricula, Hindu chieftain Rana Pratap would struggle to locate the battleground of Haldi Ghati that would make him a hero with Hindu nationalists. Suppose the RSS and Narendra Modi have their way with their own ignorant and prejudiced agenda to undermine the role of Muslims in the evolution of India’s enviable syncretic culture. The next step in conjuring a mythical golden past would involve hiding the endless internal conflicts, including caste-based exploitation and political power struggles between regional kingdoms — like the Rajput, Pallava, Chalukya and Chola — and frequent battles for dominance, and occasional sectarian disputes between religious factions including Hindus, Buddhists and Jains. The Iran war brings a totally new set of assumptions on board for any Perry Mason to grapple with. Therefore, leave Iran aside. Focus instead on how colonialism shaped and created a parallel civilisation that worked as an American cantonment in the southern Gulf based on cheap imported labour in what a former Indian diplomat of Persian descent described as “desalinated water economies”. One of the more fascinating stories circulating but never allowed to be published during my journalistic outing in the UAE was about how oil became a great equaliser between Bedouin habitations and the Iranian and Mesopotamian civilisations to the north. And so came a defter version of the overthrow of Iran’s Mohammad Mossadegh who was deposed in 1953 for nationalising a British oil company. Had Iran not existed, colonialism would still be there, staging coups and assassinations in the Gulf. The story of Sheikh Shakhbut bin Sultan Al Nahyan instantly reminds me of one of my grandfathers who had a primeval fear of banks. Shakhbut was the ruler of Abu Dhabi when he was replaced on Aug 6, 1966, by his younger brother, Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan. As with Mossadegh, the Abu Dhabi coup was carried out with the direct support of Britain, which was the colonial power overseeing the Trucial States at the time. Sheikh Shakhbut was removed from power by a coalition of his own family and the British government for a strange reason. After the discovery of oil in 1958, Abu Dhabi began accruing significant wealth, but Shakhbut refused to spend the royalties to westernise the emirate. He was so mistrustful of banks that he reportedly preferred keeping large sums of the state’s money in a box under his bed. His fate was promptly sealed. Sheikh Zayed went on to rule Abu Dhabi and became the founding president of the UAE in 1971. The current president, who joined the Abraham Accords and has become the most ardent spokesman for the destruction of Iran, is his son. The six Gulf states — Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, the UAE and Oman — are often projected as Sunni rivals of the predominantly Shia Iran, which is a grossly misleading and inaccurate description. The six were welded into the Gulf Cooperation Council originally as a foil to the pro-Soviet Baathist Iraq under a Sunni ruling elite. It was in 1990 that the seeds were first sown for the GCC to side with Israel against Saddam Hussein. The GCC members also went against each other one at a time. Saudis against Kuwait, Qatar, the UAE. The UAE against each other that resulted in a failed coup in Sharjah in the 1980s. The primary target of Saudi Arabia was Kuwait, which had a nascent parliament that threatened the Gulf’s feudal satraps. It was made worse by an overwhelming presence in the country of Palestinian nationalists. Had Iraq not invaded Kuwait, the Saudis would have, or so the story goes. It was this acrimony that US ambassador in Baghdad, April Glaspie, exploited to fool Saddam Hussein into invading Kuwait. The outcome? The first pro-Soviet state would fall since the demise of the USSR. Libya, Syria, Yemen and Palestine would follow. After every such crisis, who paid for the military expenditure and damage? The GCC states had to put the petrodollars to work as envisaged. When a state exceeded its brief, as happened when Kuwait picked up over 20 per cent of British Petroleum’s shares during an economic trough in the UK, it was quickly made to cough them up by Margaret Thatcher. The Iran war brings a totally new set of assumptions on board for any Perry Mason to grapple with. Some assume that Iran is winning but do not want to concede that the US is losing. The GCC story hangs in the balance, as does the fate of petrodollars. If BRICS wins, however, Iran wins regardless of the losses incurred. Netanyahu will need to tweak his reverie. The writer is Dawn’s correspondent in Delhi. jawednaqvi@gmail.com Published in Dawn, April 21st, 2026
